metadata.title: Guide Downloads
metadata.description: Download TravelTang PDF guides for China travel planning

guideDownloads.label: PDF Guides
guideDownloads.title: Download your China travel guides
guideDownloads.description: Two practical PDFs for overseas visitors: one explains China payment workflows, and one introduces travel preparation for China trips.
guideDownloads.empty_text: No PDF guides are available yet.

items.title: China payment logic guide
items.description: A practical guide to how payments work in China, including Alipay, WeChat Pay, bank card binding, QR-code payments, and common setup problems for international visitors.
highlights: Understand how Alipay and WeChat Pay are used in daily travel
Avoid common card binding and verification mistakes

items.title: China travel introduction guide
items.description: A concise travel introduction for China trips, covering local apps, transport habits, planning context, city movement, and practical expectations before and after arrival.
highlights: Know what to prepare before entering China
Learn practical transport and local app habits
Plan city travel with fewer first-day surprises
